# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
    skipDefaultCheckout(true)
  }

  parameters {
    choice(name: 'ARTIFACT_KIND', choices: ['single', 'zip', 'tar', 'tgz', 'tar.gz'], description: 'How the artifact should be handled after download.')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'External artifact URL. Supported: http(s)://, s3://bucket/key, artifactory://serverId/repo/path (requires JFrog CLI config).')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_FILENAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Force downloaded filename (otherwise inferred).')
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_SHA256', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Verify SHA-256 checksum of the downloaded artifact.')
    string(name: 'APP_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Application name for deployment paths/service control.')
    string(name: 'APP_VERSION', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Version label for release directory naming.')
    text(name: 'PROD_HOSTS', defaultValue: 'prod01.example.com\nprod02.example.com', description: 'One host per line.')
    string(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'prod-ssh', description: 'Jenkins SSH private key credentials ID.')
    string(name: 'SSH_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'SSH user on production servers.')
    string(name: 'SSH_PORT', defaultValue: '22', description: 'SSH port.')
    string(name: 'REMOTE_BASE_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt', description: 'Base directory on remote hosts.')
    string(name: 'REMOTE_SERVICE', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. systemd service name to restart (e.g., myapp). Leave empty to skip service restart.')
    booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'If true, do not actually deploy; only validate and show plan.')
    booleanParam(name: 'RUN_SMOKE_CHECK', defaultValue: true, description: 'If true, run basic smoke check after deployment (configurable below).')
    string(name: 'SMOKE_CHECK_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. URL to curl from Jenkins after deploy, e.g., https://myapp.example.com/health')
    choice(name: 'SMOKE_CHECK_EXPECT', choices: ['200', '204', '302', 'any-2xx', 'any'], description: 'Expected HTTP status code from SMOKE_CHECK_URL.')
    booleanParam(name: 'REQUIRE_APPROVAL', defaultValue: true, description: 'Require manual approval before deploying to production.')
    string(name: 'APPROVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional. Comma-separated Jenkins usernames allowed to approve. Empty = anyone with Job/Build permission.')
  }

  environment {
    WORK_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy"
    STAGE_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy/stage"
    PKG_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy/pkg"
    DEPLOY_LOG = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy/deploy.log"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Validate Parameters') {
      steps {
        script {
          if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) error("ARTIFACT_URL is required.")
          def hosts = params.PROD_HOSTS.split('\n').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          if (hosts.isEmpty()) error("PROD_HOSTS must contain at least one host.")
          if (params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim() == '') error("SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID is required.")
          if (params.SSH_USER?.trim() == '') error("SSH_USER is required.")
          if (params.REMOTE_BASE_DIR?.trim() == '') error("REMOTE_BASE_DIR is required.")
          if ((params.RUN_SMOKE_CHECK) && (!params.SMOKE_CHECK_URL?.trim())) {
            echo "RUN_SMOKE_CHECK is true but SMOKE_CHECK_URL is empty; smoke check will be skipped."
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare Workspace') {
      steps {
        sh """
          set -euo pipefail
          rm -rf "${WORK_DIR}"
          mkdir -p "${STAGE_DIR}" "${PKG_DIR}"
          : > "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
        """
      }
    }

    stage('Download Artifact') {
      steps {
        script {
          def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
          def guessed = url.tokenize('/').last()
          if (guessed.contains('?')) guessed = guessed.split('\\?')[0]
          if (!guessed) guessed = "artifact"
          def filename = params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME?.trim() ? params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME.trim() : guessed
          env.ARTIFACT_LOCAL = "${PKG_DIR}/${filename}"

          if (url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')) {
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              echo "Downloading via HTTP(S): ${url}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
              curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 -o "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" "${url}"
              ls -lh "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            """
          } else if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "aws CLI not found"; exit 2; }
              echo "Downloading via S3: ${url}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
              aws s3 cp "${url}" "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}"
              ls -lh "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            """
          } else if (url.startsWith('artifactory://')) {
            def path = url - 'artifactory://'
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              command -v jf >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "JFrog CLI (jf) not found"; exit 2; }
              echo "Downloading via Artifactory: ${url}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
              jf rt dl --fail-no-op --flat=true "${path}" "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}"
              ls -lh "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            """
          } else {
            error("Unsupported ARTIFACT_URL scheme. Use http(s)://, s3://, or artifactory://")
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Verify Checksum') {
      when {
        expression { return params.ARTIFACT_SHA256?.trim() }
      }
      steps {
        sh """
          set -euo pipefail
          command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "sha256sum not found"; exit 2; }
          echo "${params.ARTIFACT_SHA256.trim()}  ${env.ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" | sha256sum -c -
          echo "SHA256 verified" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
        """
      }
    }

    stage('Unpack / Stage') {
      steps {
        script {
          def kind = params.ARTIFACT_KIND
          if (kind == 'single') {
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              echo "Staging single artifact" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
              cp -f "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" "${STAGE_DIR}/"
              ls -lah "${STAGE_DIR}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            """
          } else if (kind == 'zip') {
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              command -v unzip >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "unzip not found"; exit 2; }
              echo "Unpacking zip" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
              unzip -q "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" -d "${STAGE_DIR}"
              ls -lah "${STAGE_DIR}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            """
          } else if (kind in ['tar','tgz','tar.gz']) {
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail
              command -v tar >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "tar not found"; exit 2; }
              echo "Unpacking tar" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
              tar -xf "${ARTIFACT_LOCAL}" -C "${STAGE_DIR}"
              ls -lah "${STAGE_DIR}" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            """
          } else {
            error("Unsupported ARTIFACT_KIND: ${kind}")
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Approval') {
      when {
        expression { return params.REQUIRE_APPROVAL && !params.DRY_RUN }
      }
      steps {
        script {
          def msg = "Approve production deployment of ${params.APP_NAME} ${params.APP_VERSION ?: ''}\nArtifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}\nHosts:\n${params.PROD_HOSTS}"
          if (params.APPROVERS?.trim()) {
            def submitters = params.APPROVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }.join(',')
            input message: msg, ok: 'Deploy', submitter: submitters
          } else {
            input message: msg, ok: 'Deploy'
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      steps {
        script {
          def hosts = params.PROD_HOSTS.split('\n').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
          def versionLabel = params.APP_VERSION?.trim() ? params.APP_VERSION.trim() : new Date().format("yyyyMMddHHmmss", TimeZone.getTimeZone('UTC'))
          def remoteAppDir = "${params.REMOTE_BASE_DIR}/${params.APP_NAME}"
          def remoteReleasesDir = "${remoteAppDir}/releases"
          def remoteReleaseDir = "${remoteReleasesDir}/${versionLabel}-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
          def remoteCurrentLink = "${remoteAppDir}/current"
          def remoteSharedDir = "${remoteAppDir}/shared"
          def remoteTmpDir = "${remoteAppDir}/tmp/${versionLabel}-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"

          env.REMOTE_RELEASE_DIR = remoteReleaseDir

          if (params.DRY_RUN) {
            echo "DRY_RUN enabled. Would deploy to: ${hosts}"
            echo "Remote release dir: ${remoteReleaseDir}"
            return
          }

          sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
            def port = params.SSH_PORT?.trim() ? params.SSH_PORT.trim() : '22'
            def user = params.SSH_USER.trim()

            def runOnHost = { String host, String cmd ->
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                ssh -p ${port} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new ${user}@${host} '${cmd.replace("'", "'\\''")}'
              """
            }

            def scpToHost = { String host, String from, String to ->
              sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                scp -P ${port} -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -r "${from}" ${user}@${host}:"${to}"
              """
            }

            for (h in hosts) {
              echo "Deploying to ${h}"

              runOnHost(h, """
                set -euo pipefail
                sudo -n true 2>/dev/null || true
                mkdir -p "${remoteReleasesDir}" "${remoteSharedDir}" "${remoteTmpDir}"
              """.trim())

              scpToHost(h, "${STAGE_DIR}/", "${remoteTmpDir}/")

              runOnHost(h, """
                set -euo pipefail
                if [ -d "${remoteReleaseDir}" ]; then rm -rf "${remoteReleaseDir}"; fi
                mv "${remoteTmpDir}" "${remoteReleaseDir}"
                ln -sfn "${remoteReleaseDir}" "${remoteCurrentLink}"
              """.trim())

              if (params.REMOTE_SERVICE?.trim()) {
                def svc = params.REMOTE_SERVICE.trim()
                runOnHost(h, """
                  set -euo pipefail
                  if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                    sudo systemctl daemon-reload || true
                    sudo systemctl restart "${svc}"
                    sudo systemctl is-active --quiet "${svc}"
                  else
                    echo "systemctl not available; skipping service restart"
                  fi
                """.trim())
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Smoke Check') {
      when {
        expression { return !params.DRY_RUN && params.RUN_SMOKE_CHECK && params.SMOKE_CHECK_URL?.trim() }
      }
      steps {
        script {
          def url = params.SMOKE_CHECK_URL.trim()
          def expect = params.SMOKE_CHECK_EXPECT
          sh """
            set -euo pipefail
            command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "curl not found"; exit 2; }
            echo "Running smoke check: ${url} (expect: ${expect})" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            code=\$(curl -k -sS -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 20 --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 "${url}" || true)
            echo "Smoke check HTTP status: \$code" | tee -a "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
            case "${expect}" in
              any) exit 0 ;;
              any-2xx) [ "\$code" -ge 200 ] && [ "\$code" -lt 300 ] ;;
              *) [ "\$code" = "${expect}" ] ;;
            esac
          """
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      archiveArtifacts artifacts: '_deploy/deploy.log', allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
    }
    failure {
      echo "Deployment failed. See _deploy/deploy.log for details."
    }
  }
}
